archimate:DataObject.name: ArchiMate Inventory-to-DeliveBusiness layer (yellow) Warehouse , inventory management (gammes/ranges, nomenclatures) , transporter, logisticsBusiness process : Order and checks, delivery managementApplication Layer (blue) IT - application to manage the inventory and deliveries ERP parcel trackingTechnology Layer (Green)System software, hardwaremobile device ? (to scan parcels to ensure the tracking -> here or in the application layer?)cloud server, data managementpart 1as-is/baseline assessment 20%part2 to-be alternative solution design 40%part3…
